'''Tuulab''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Triitus system/Legends|Triitus system]] of the [[Corva sector/Legends|Corva sector]].

==Description==
Tuulab was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Triitus system/Legends|Triitus system]], located in the [[Corva sector/Legends|Corva sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. A [[Standard day/Legends|day]] on Tuulab lasted 18 [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]] and a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] on Tuulab lasted 452 [[Local day/Legends|local days]]. Tuulab was a terrestrial world with a breathable [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], standard [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]], a moderate hydrosphere, and a temperate climate with mild weather. It featured abundant natural resources and terrain that included plains, hills, and [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]]. The planet exported [[Mineral/Legends|minerals]] and imported medical supplies.<ref name="R" />

==History==
During the height of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] reign, a group of 721 [[Human/Legends|Humans]] settled on Tuulab in an expedition led by [[Ingas Lek]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. As knowledge of the colony became available in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], some [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] citizens who cared neither for the Galactic Empire or the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] joined the original settlers. The population grew, eventually exceeding 6,000 inhabitants, but no government was ever formed and neither the Empire or the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] established a presence on the planet.<ref name="R" />

==Inhabitants==
The inhabitants of Tuulab, referred to as [[Tuulabi]], numbered about 6,000 and preferred rural existence without the burden of galactic [[Politics/Legends|politics]] or conflict. Conditions on the planet provided its population with almost everything they needed for survival. The [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Mahk'khar]] resided in a [[Mahk'khar's Palace|palace]] located on the western coast on the northern continent.<ref name="R" />
